author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for a native GrepTool with regex + context lines, parity with CC tools/GrepTool/GrepTool.ts. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires new tool implementation, ripgrep-style regex engine choice (regex vs ripgrep crate), -A/-B/-C context window handling, line-range output formatting, system-prompt update. Multi-day feature work. Parent audit #523.
